expectations.text: Response contains a direct image URL ending in .png, .jpg, .jpeg, .svg, or .webp as the best source
Response mentions inspecting or stripping CMS/CDN transform parameters
expectations.evidence: 'Stripping the hash-prefixed subdirectory path and the _<uuid>-prv suffix, replacing with a flat /files/<release_id>/<filename>.png, recovers the full-resolution source upload'

expectations.text: Response names at least one specific company whose site was checked
Response distinguishes between official Disability:IN source and a company hosting their own copy of the badge
expectations.evidence: 'This file is a recipient-hosted copy, not an official Disability:IN source file. The official Disability:IN website and their S3 bucket do not have publicly accessible badge downloads for the DEI seal without authentication.'
